description: Search for or read a FHIR MedicationDispense resource recording pharmacy dispensing events (outpatient pickups, inpatient ward stock, single-dose issues). For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide patient, subject, identifier, or context. Use status to filter completed, in-progress, or cancelled. Use whenhandedover or whenprepared for date filtering.

searchParams._id: MedicationDispense resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.category: Category of dispense (e.g. inpatient, outpatient, community, discharge)
searchParams.context: Encounter or EpisodeOfCare associated with the dispense
searchParams.destination: Location where the medication was sent
searchParams.medication: Medication reference (when medication is a Reference)
searchParams.performer: Who performed the dispense (Practitioner, Organization, Device)
searchParams.receiver: Who collected the medication (Patient or Practitioner)
searchParams.status: Status: preparation, in-progress, cancelled, on-hold, completed, entered-in-error, stopped, declined, unknown
searchParams.subject: Subject of the dispense (Patient or Group)
searchParams.type: Type of dispense (trial fill, partial fill, emergency fill, etc.)
searchParams.whenhandedover: Date the medication was given to the patient
searchParams.whenprepared: Date the medication was packaged and reviewed
